title: BerserkerZ
body:
LevelZ Addon For Berserker Mod.
For this datapack you need the Beserker(RPG) mod and if you are looking for comfort I recomend global datapack folder.
In this datapack. I have done restrictions for armor and battleaxes. For magic ones I've put restrictions of 20 lvls.

![json files](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e0694fd5ca6df777e262a0685f5582d30475878.png)
